titleStmt.title: SII 18.260: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 260. (B.K. No. 123 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar at the south-entrance of the Ark-killah

summary.p: This inscription belonging to the reign of Rāmachandrarāya is dated in Śaka 1205, Svabhānu, Kārtika ba. 30, Monday. But for the week-day, the details correspond to A.D. 1283, November 20. The week-day was Saturday. In the previous year, Chitrabhānu, which was S11aka 1205 (current) the details regularly correspond to A.D. 1282, November ba. 2, Monday. This is probably the intended date.

It registers a gift of paddy and oil for the offerings of god Narasiṁhadēva of Vijeyāpura, also known as Dakshiṇa-Vāraṇāsi. The donation was made by Sarvādhikāri Dēvaya-Nāyaka. The gift is stated to have been made after worshipping the five Huris.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujaba
ḷapra Uḍhapratāpacakravartti śrīrāmacaṁdrarā
ya vijayarājyōdayada śakavarṣa 1205 neya sva
bhānusaṁvatsarada kārttika ba 30 sōmavāradaṁ
du śrīmatsarvvādhikāri dēvayanāyakaru śrīma
ddakṣiṇavāraṇāsi vijeyāpurada Ayduhuri
gaḷanu pō(pū)jji(ji)si śrīmaṁnnarasiṁhvadēvargge U
deyada maṁgaḷāratiya sameyada naivēdya
kke Ā sthaḷadalu Aḍadavaṇavāgi hannidhānya
vaṁ koṁḍu māṟuvavaralli hoṁge solla
ge bhattavaṁ paḍedu koṭṭaru Ī dharmmavantā Aydu
hurigaḷu pratipāḷisuvaru Ā dē
vara naṁdādīvigege Āḍadavaṇavāgi Eṇneya
koṁḍu māṟuva kuṁcaḍigittiya
ra pasāraṁgaḷalli paḷigeyeṇneya dhā
rāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭaru maṁgaḷa
mahāśrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 18.260 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
